name: torso_frame_grasp
description: Execute continuous grasp using a target expressed in torso_link4 coordinates.

parameters.target_x/target_y/target_z: Target object position in torso_frame coordinates.
parameters.target_torso: Alternative [x, y, z] target in torso_frame coordinates.
parameters.center_reference: Alternative [x, y, z] target from perception output.
parameters.median_reference: Alternative [x, y, z] target from perception output.
parameters.position_input_path: Alternative compact perception JSON path. Reads position_key from this file.
parameters.position_key: Position field to read from position_input_path. Defaults to median_reference.
parameters.torso_frame: Reference body/site name. Defaults to torso_link4.
parameters.object_body: Optional MuJoCo object body used when use_object_target is true.
parameters.use_object_target: If true, ignore explicit target and read object_body from MuJoCo state.
parameters.grasp_offset_x/grasp_offset_y/grasp_offs: Offset from object center to grasp target in torso_frame coordinates.
parameters.enable_visual_grasp_correction: If true, add visual_grasp_offset_z when target comes from perception.
parameters.visual_grasp_offset_z: Additional torso-frame z offset for visual targets. Defaults to 0.0 and should be passed explicitly.
parameters.settle_before_steps: Simulation steps to settle before grasp execution. Defaults to 1500.
parameters.pregrasp_offset_torso: Required [x, y, z] offset from grasp pose to pregrasp pose.
parameters.pregrasp_offset_x/pregrasp_offset_y/preg: Required offset components if pregrasp_offset_torso is not used.
parameters.lift_height: Lift distance in torso +Z after closing gripper.
parameters.attach_on_close: Simulation-only shortcut. If true with direct_qpos, attach object_body to gripper after close.
parameters.topdown_mode: vertical_down, forward_parallel, or current. palm_down and x_forward are legacy aliases.
